name: qianxin-vs-secvss3600
description: OctoBus package for QIANXIN SecVSS 3600 scan task management, result query, device status, and task control APIs.

QIANXIN_VS_SecVSS3600.QIANXIN_VS_SecVSS3.name: get-device-status
QIANXIN_VS_SecVSS3600.QIANXIN_VS_SecVSS3.description: Query scanner health: CPU load, disk/memory usage, engine status.

QIANXIN_VS_SecVSS3600.QIANXIN_VS_SecVSS3.name: list-tasks
QIANXIN_VS_SecVSS3600.QIANXIN_VS_SecVSS3.description: List scan tasks with optional status/time/pagination filters.

QIANXIN_VS_SecVSS3600.QIANXIN_VS_SecVSS3.name: get-task-status
QIANXIN_VS_SecVSS3600.QIANXIN_VS_SecVSS3.description: Get current status code (0-9) and progress percentage of a scan task.

QIANXIN_VS_SecVSS3600.QIANXIN_VS_SecVSS3.name: submit-scan-task
QIANXIN_VS_SecVSS3600.QIANXIN_VS_SecVSS3.description: Submit a new scan task against an authorized target IP/CIDR/domain.

QIANXIN_VS_SecVSS3600.QIANXIN_VS_SecVSS3.name: control-task
QIANXIN_VS_SecVSS3600.QIANXIN_VS_SecVSS3.description: Control a scan task lifecycle: start, stop, pause, continue, enable, disable, or delete.

QIANXIN_VS_SecVSS3600.QIANXIN_VS_SecVSS3.name: query-sys-scan-result
QIANXIN_VS_SecVSS3600.QIANXIN_VS_SecVSS3.description: Query system vulnerability scan results including host list and vuln counts.

QIANXIN_VS_SecVSS3600.QIANXIN_VS_SecVSS3.name: query-web-scan-result
QIANXIN_VS_SecVSS3600.QIANXIN_VS_SecVSS3.description: Query web vulnerability scan results for each scanned host.

QIANXIN_VS_SecVSS3600.QIANXIN_VS_SecVSS3.name: query-weak-pass-result
QIANXIN_VS_SecVSS3600.QIANXIN_VS_SecVSS3.description: Query weak password scan results: cracked accounts, services, and ports.
